title: phaseolus vulgaris var. subochraceus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. subochraceus, also known as the Scarlet Runner bean, is a variety of the common bean plant, characterized by its vibrant scarlet flowers and edible seeds. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds that have been shown to aid in wound healing and combat infections. The health benefits of Scarlet Runner beans are numerous, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing essential nutrients such as protein, fiber, and minerals. In herbal preparations, the seeds, leaves, and flowers of the Scarlet Runner bean can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and fever.
